Test Case: Display all channels on app launch
Steps:
1. Launch app
2. Observe channel list
Expected Result: All channels displayed with name/logo/category/resolution/bitrate/country

Steps:
1. Launch app
2. Check validated channels
Expected Result: Green checkmark for working channels / red X for failed channels

Steps:
1. Scroll through channel list
2. Observe logos
Expected Result: Channel logos load correctly / fallback to TV/Radio icon if missing

Steps:
1. View channel subtitle
2. Verify format
Expected Result: Shows: Category + Resolution + Bitrate + Country (e.g. "News - 720p - 2.5 Mbps - US")

Steps:
1. Tap any channel
2. Observe navigation
Expected Result: Navigates to PlayerScreen with video playing

Steps: 1. Scroll rapidly through channels
